Title: Idol of Dumbun
Appearance: A simple silver idol of a bunny. It's eyes are dark pink gems that seem to pulsate a faint glow in a heartbeat rhythm.
Description: An idol of Dumbun, a pet to the legendary sorceress Sajrukh, who immortalized her pet and created an idol which drains the intelligence of those who make eye-contact with it, granting Dumbun the stolen intelligence.
Mechanic: Steals intelligence from those who gaze upon it.
